ability.fightingstyles.alektor_black_tri: Spawn Alektor trion beasts that immobilize targets and lock them into brutal capture patterns.
ability.fightingstyles.amo_black_trigger: Unleash Amo's classified disaster trigger to saturate the battlefield with overlapping blasts.
Fire steady Asteroid rounds for reliable straight-line shooter pressure and simple volley control.
ability.fightingstyles.bagworm_mode.desc: Maintain longer stealth by trading movement speed for sustained concealment.
ability.fightingstyles.bagworm_trigger.d: Toggle Bagworm concealment for slower but longer stealth with sustained Trion drain.
ability.fightingstyles.borboros_black_tr: Toggle Borboros to stay resilient, toxic, and hard to stop while Trion continuously feeds the form.
Compress Borboros into a dense bulwark that reinforces you while poisoning anyone caught too close.
ability.fightingstyles.borboros_form_req: Requires Borboros form to be active.
ability.fightingstyles.borboros_logia.de: Passive ability. While Borboros form is active, ordinary attacks phase through your corrosive body unless they can bypass logia defenses.
ability.fightingstyles.borboros_mode.des: Sustain Borboros form to stay resilient while poisoning enemies around you.
ability.fightingstyles.borboros_surge.de: Explode Borboros forward in a corrosive surge that plows through targets in your path.
ability.fightingstyles.chameleon_mode.de: Stay cloaked while moving faster until you toggle Chameleon off or your Trion reserve collapses.
ability.fightingstyles.chameleon_trigger: Toggle Chameleon camouflage to stay cloaked while moving faster at steady Trion upkeep.
ability.fightingstyles.cobra_trigger.des: Sharpen Viper control routes into faster, harder-angle Cobra kill paths.
ability.fightingstyles.egret_trigger.des: Charge and release Border's steady long-range sniper beam with a 256-block standard reach.
ability.fightingstyles.escudo_trigger.de: Raise a connected Escudo barricade from the aimed point to block lanes and shove enemies back.
ability.fightingstyles.flame_manipulatio: Launches a concentrated fireball that explodes on impact, dealing massive fire damage in an area
Fires a continuous beam of flames that burns all enemies in its path
Snap your fingers to ignite a target with precise flame strikes
ability.fightingstyles.fujin_black_trigg: Project line-of-sight wind slashes through terrain around your marked target, storing ten cuts before Fujin must cycle into cooldown.
ability.fightingstyles.full_arms_mode.de: Keep Full Arms active to reinforce offense, labor, and durability until you dismiss it.
ability.fightingstyles.full_arms_trigger: Toggle Full Arms to keep your body reinforced for offense, work, and durability at continuous cost.
ability.fightingstyles.geist_mode.desc: Keep Geist active for stronger offense and mobility while carrying its weakness drawback.
ability.fightingstyles.geist_trigger.des: Toggle Geist overload for stronger offense and mobility while paying a constant Trion upkeep.
ability.fightingstyles.gimlet_trigger.de: Compress Asteroid into fast armor-piercing drill shots for anti-guard pressure.
ability.fightingstyles.grasshopper_trigg: Create an elastic Grasshopper pad to launch yourself through new attack or escape routes.
ability.fightingstyles.hornet_trigger.de: Flood the field with extra Hound bullets and delayed homing pursuit lines.
ability.fightingstyles.hound_trigger.des: Launch Hound bullets that bend into targets from shifting pursuit angles.
ability.fightingstyles.ibis_trigger.desc: Fire a heavy anti-materiel sniper beam that punches through lined-up targets across a 512-block standard reach.
ability.fightingstyles.idaten_trigger.de: Burst forward with Idaten for explosive acceleration, pursuit, and evasive route changes.
ability.fightingstyles.ink_cloud.descrip: Spray a cloud of ink to blind nearby enemies, then vanish with invisibility and a speed boost for a quick escape!
ability.fightingstyles.kogetsu_trigger.d: Summon Kogetsu for disciplined sword exchanges and dependable trion blade pressure.
One colossal tentacle punch blasts through everything in front of you.
ability.fightingstyles.kraken_rage.descr: "KRAKEN RAGE!!!" Toggle between a storm of eight flailing tentacles and a single colossal finishing punch! (Fruitless)
Eight giant flailing tentacles thrash everything around you.
ability.fightingstyles.lightning_trigger: Release a fast light sniper beam for quick snapshots and repeated pressure across a 192-block standard reach.
ability.fightingstyles.meteor_trigger.de: Fire explosive Meteor shells to break clustered targets and crack open tight positions.
ability.fightingstyles.octo_arms_passive: Your phantom octopus arms enhance your unarmed strikes. The more you fight, the stronger your arms manifest.
ability.fightingstyles.octo_gatling.desc: Unleash a storm of phantom fists! All eight arms punch rapidly, overwhelming everything in front of you.
ability.fightingstyles.octo_grab.descrip: Extend a phantom arm to grab a distant enemy and pull them toward you while crushing them in your grip!
ability.fightingstyles.octo_pistol.descr: Extend a phantom arm to punch a distant target. Your pink arm stretches out and delivers a powerful blow.
ability.fightingstyles.octo_shield.descr: Wrap phantom arms around yourself to form a protective barrier that reduces damage and reflects attacks!
ability.fightingstyles.octo_whip.descrip: Sweep a phantom arm in a wide arc! Hits all enemies in front of you and knocks them back.
ability.fightingstyles.organon_black_tri: Call Organon blades into a savage close-range storm of repeated cuts and orbiting pressure.
ability.fightingstyles.organon_blades.de: Passive ability. While Organon is your active Trigger, orbiting blades sharpen your movement and melee pressure.
ability.fightingstyles.organon_blender.d: Turn Organon into a high-speed blender rush that tears through a packed frontline.
ability.fightingstyles.organon_impale.de: Drive Organon inward for a focused impale that pins a target under converging blades.
ability.fightingstyles.organon_storm.des: Launch Organon's baseline storm to carve through clustered enemies with layered orbiting cuts.
ability.fightingstyles.radar_trigger.des: Pulse a holographic sweep that reveals nearby hostile signatures and battlefield pressure.
ability.fightingstyles.raygust_blade_mod: Switch Raygust into blade form for a heavy close-range trion slash.
ability.fightingstyles.raygust_guard_mod: Raise Raygust in guard form with a broader linked wall and a short armored shove.
ability.fightingstyles.raygust_trigger.d: Switch Raygust between a broad guard wall and a crushing blade-form counterattack.
ability.fightingstyles.salamander_trigge: Bend explosive Viper shells around cover before the Salamander blast arrives.
Grow flexible Scorpion blades for sudden lunges, hooks, and close-range reshaping attacks.
ability.fightingstyles.shield_fixed_mode: Anchor a connected flat hex wall at your aim point to cut off lanes and incoming fire.
ability.fightingstyles.shield_focus_mode: Maintain a mobile linked hex wall that swings toward the nearest incoming threat.
ability.fightingstyles.shield_full_guard: Surround yourself with a hex ring that locks down nearby angles at the highest Trion upkeep.
ability.fightingstyles.shield_trigger.de: Toggle a linked wall of flat Shield hexes that turns toward danger, catches projectiles, and holds a lane while Trion lasts.
ability.fightingstyles.speiraskia_black_: Warp space with Speiraskia to blink across the field and punish whatever waits at the exit.
ability.fightingstyles.teleporter_trigge: Warp along your line of sight for short-range repositioning and sudden angle changes.
Guide explosive shells into a target before detonating them with Tomahawk.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_have_inve: Keep the matching Trigger anywhere in your inventory.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_hold_main: Hold the matching Trigger in your main hand.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_hold_offh: Hold the matching Trigger in your off hand.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_holder_ac: Access: Use it from the active Main/Sub pair in your Trigger Holder.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_loadout_c: Alt mode switches between a Trigger On toggle and direct Holder access.
Control Trigger On and open the Trigger Holder without leaving the MMNM ability bar.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_loadout_m: Open the Trigger Holder screen to load, clear, and rearrange Main/Sub slots.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_loadout_t: Toggle the holder on or off so the loaded Main/Sub pair and their composites become your active kit.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_register_: Requires this Trigger to be loaded into your holder. Composite Triggers appear automatically from the active pair.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_swap_cont: Alt mode switches between Main and Sub slot cycling.
Cycle the live Main or Sub slot of your Trigger Holder directly from the MMNM ability bar.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_swap_main: Cycle the active Main slot forward through the loaded Main Trigger slots.
ability.fightingstyles.trigger_swap_sub_: Cycle the active Sub slot forward through the loaded Sub Trigger slots.
ability.fightingstyles.viper_trigger.des: Guide Viper rounds through changing routes before they fold back into the target.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_black_trigge: Toggle Yuma's Black Trigger suit to keep copied seals online, reinforce movement, and self-repair the Trion body at continuous upkeep.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_seal_bind.de: Default: Chain multiple hostiles. Sneak: Anchor one target in place. Sprint: Chain and Anchor nearby enemies together.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_seal_bolt.de: Default: twin Bolt shots. Sneak: Bolt Quinti spread. Sprint: Echo-guided bolt swarm.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_seal_boost.d: Default: copied Boost seal for regen, power, and a rush strike. Sneak: Bound Double launch. Sprint: Bound Sexta lunge.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_seal_radar.d: Pulse out Echo seals to reveal hostile signatures. Sneak focuses the sweep. Sprint expands it into a wider combat read.
Default: following shield wall. Sneak: Shield Double fixed barrier. Sprint: Boost + Shield rush screen.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_suit_mode.de: Trigger On and sustain Yuma's Black Trigger suit to keep copied seals online while the Trion body repairs itself.
ability.fightingstyles.yuma_suit_require: Requires Yuma's Black Trigger suit to be active.
ability.mineminenomi.axe_slash.desc: Releases a powerful air slash using an Axe Dial. Does not consume the dial.
ability.mineminenomi.breath_burst.desc: Uses a Breath Dial to launch yourself in the direction you're looking. Grants temporary fall damage immunity.
ability.mineminenomi.dial_conservation.d: Passive ability. You have a chance to conserve dials when using abilities.
ability.mineminenomi.eisen_shield.desc: Creates an iron cloud shield using an Eisen Dial. Blocks incoming damage for a limited time.
Manipulate flames using a Golden Flame Dial. 3 modes: Combustion (fireball), Beam (continuous fire), Snap (precise hits). (Fruitless)
ability.mineminenomi.flame_wave.desc: Releases a cone of fire using a Flame Dial. Burns enemies caught in the blast.
ability.mineminenomi.flash_dial_blast.de: Releases a blinding flash using a Flash Dial. Blinds and weakens nearby enemies.
ability.mineminenomi.impact_fist.desc: Toggle: Enhances your attacks with Impact Dial energy. Consumes dials on successful hits.
ability.mineminenomi.milky_road.desc: Creates a line of milky road blocks using a Milky Dial. Damages and slows enemies.
ability.mineminenomi.octo_walk.desc: Deploy tentacles to nearby surfaces for 3D movement. Double-jump to toggle lift mode. Jump/Sneak controls vertical movement. (Fruitless)
item.fightingstyles.alektor_black_trigge: Spawns trion beasts that immobilize targets like cubed prisoners.
item.fightingstyles.amo_black_trigger.de: A classified catastrophe that saturates the battlefield with overlapping blasts.
item.fightingstyles.asteroid_trigger.des: Standard gunner Trigger tuned for dependable bullet volleys. When active, it modifies compatible handgun and shotgun frames.
item.fightingstyles.bagworm_trigger.desc: A longer stealth cloak that trades speed for concealment.
item.fightingstyles.borboros_black_trigg: Shifts through unstable states to become resilient, toxic, and hard to stop.
item.fightingstyles.chameleon_trigger.de: Bends light around your trion body to hide you for a short burst.
item.fightingstyles.cobra_trigger.desc: Asteroid-Viper composite Trigger for sharp curving attack lines. When active, it modifies compatible handgun and shotgun frames.
item.fightingstyles.egret_trigger.desc: Left-click fires Border's steady long-range sniper beam with a 256-block standard reach. Hold right-click to aim down sights while the MMNM ability stays separate.
item.fightingstyles.escudo_trigger.desc: Flares out a sudden trion barricade that repels nearby enemies.
Stores ten line-of-sight wind slashes before Fujin enters cooldown, detonating cuts around your marked point.
item.fightingstyles.full_arms_trigger.de: A prototype all-in loadout that floods your trion body with offensive output.
item.fightingstyles.geist_trigger.desc: A prototype overload that boosts combat power at the cost of stability.
item.fightingstyles.gimlet_trigger.desc: Asteroid composite Trigger that condenses dense armor-piercing rounds. When active, it modifies compatible handgun and shotgun frames.
Creates an elastic trion pad that launches you through the air.
item.fightingstyles.hornet_trigger.desc: Hound composite Trigger that splits into tighter homing swarms. When active, it modifies compatible assault rifle, grenade launcher, and minigun frames.
item.fightingstyles.hound_trigger.desc: Guided gunner Trigger that bends shots onto hostile targets. When active, it modifies compatible handgun and shotgun frames.
item.fightingstyles.ibis_trigger.desc: Left-click fires a heavy anti-materiel beam that punches through lined-up targets across a 512-block standard reach. Hold right-click to aim down sights.
item.fightingstyles.idaten_trigger.desc: A mobility prototype for explosive acceleration and pursuit.
item.fightingstyles.kogetsu_trigger.desc: A rigid Attacker Trigger blade built for disciplined, direct sword exchanges.
item.fightingstyles.lightning_trigger.de: Left-click snaps off a fast light sniper beam with a 192-block standard reach. Hold right-click to aim down sights for quick precision follow-ups.
item.fightingstyles.meteor_trigger.desc: Explosive gunner Trigger built for arcing bombardment and splash pressure. When active, it modifies compatible assault rifle, grenade launcher, and minigun frames.
item.fightingstyles.organon_black_trigge: Calls orbiting blades into a savage close-range storm of repeated cuts.
item.fightingstyles.radar_trigger.desc: Performs a holographic sweep that lights up hostile signatures around you.
item.fightingstyles.raygust_trigger.desc: A heavy blade-and-shield hybrid that braces incoming fire and answers with a Thruster-like ram.
item.fightingstyles.salamander_trigger.d: Meteor-Viper composite Trigger that bends explosive routes around cover. When active, it modifies compatible assault rifle, grenade launcher, and minigun frames.
item.fightingstyles.scorpion_trigger.des: A shape-shifting Attacker Trigger that grows flexible blades from the body for sudden lunges.
item.fightingstyles.shield_trigger.desc: A flexible trion barrier that can focus forward, lock into place, or expand into Full Guard.
item.fightingstyles.speiraskia_black_tri: Warps space to blink across the field and punish whatever is near the exit.
item.fightingstyles.teleporter_trigger.d: Short-range warp movement based on your line of sight.
item.fightingstyles.tomahawk_trigger.des: Meteor-Hound composite Trigger that mixes blast force with guided pursuit. When active, it modifies compatible assault rifle, grenade launcher, and minigun frames.
item.fightingstyles.trion_grenade_launch: Single-shot trion grenade launcher. By default it fires explosive shells, and active rifle-class gunner triggers modify the payload.
item.fightingstyles.trion_minigun.desc: High-rate trion minigun. By default it streams rapid bullets, and active rifle-class gunner triggers modify the burst.
item.fightingstyles.trion_pistol.desc: Semi-auto trion handgun. By default it fires standard bullets, and active pistol-class gunner triggers modify the shot.
item.fightingstyles.trion_rifle.desc: Automatic trion assault rifle. By default it fires standard bullets, and active rifle-class gunner triggers modify the shot.
item.fightingstyles.trion_shotgun.desc: Close-range trion shotgun. By default it fires a spreading blast, and active pistol-class gunner triggers modify the shell pattern.
item.fightingstyles.trion_smg.desc: Fast close-range trion SMG. By default it sprays short-range bullets, and active pistol-class gunner triggers modify the burst.
item.fightingstyles.viper_trigger.desc: Programmable gunner Trigger that curves shots through set routes. When active, it modifies compatible handgun and shotgun frames.
item.fightingstyles.yuma_black_trigger.d: Copies Bound, Boost, Chain, Anchor, Echo, Shield, and Bolt-style seals into a fast-repairing Black Trigger body.
message.fightingstyles.borboros_form_req: Borboros form must be active to use this technique.
message.fightingstyles.build_look_at_mar: Look at a linked Shipwright Marker to save.
message.fightingstyles.build_markers_not: Markers are not linked! Right-click a marker to link them.
message.fightingstyles.build_needs_selec: Set two corners first by sneaking and using the ability.
message.fightingstyles.build_too_large: Build area is too large! Maximum 32x32x32 blocks.
message.fightingstyles.invalid_block: That block cannot be used for this ability!
message.fightingstyles.need_axe: You need an axe to use this ability!
message.fightingstyles.need_offhand_bloc: You need blocks in your offhand!
message.fightingstyles.no_dial: You don't have the required dial!
message.fightingstyles.no_golden_dial: You need a Golden Flame Dial to use this ability!
message.fightingstyles.no_safe_destinati: No safe destination in that direction.
message.fightingstyles.not_a_dial: Only dials can be placed in the dial bag!
message.fightingstyles.not_enough_offhan: You need %s blocks in your offhand!
message.fightingstyles.not_enough_trion: Not enough Trion. Need %s, current reserve is %s / %s.
message.fightingstyles.requires_fruitles: %s cannot be used alongside a Devil Fruit!
message.fightingstyles.requires_trion_st: You need the Trion fighting style to use this Trigger!
message.fightingstyles.ship_required: You must be inside a ship or on a boat to use this ability!
message.fightingstyles.side_effect_comma: Cleared manifested Side Effect for %s player(s).
message.fightingstyles.side_effect_inval: That Side Effect id is not registered.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_bailout_a: Bail Out triggered. You escaped with a reduced Trion reserve.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_bailout_c: Bail Out unavailable for %s more seconds.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_have_inve: Keep %s anywhere in your inventory to use this ability.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_hold_main: Hold %s in your main hand to use this ability.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_hold_offh: Hold %s in your off hand to use this ability.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_holder_hi: Use Trigger Loadout in Holder Menu mode to open the Trigger Holder. Trigger On and Trigger Swap now live on the MMNM ability bar.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_inactive_: %s is loaded, but not in the active Main/Sub pair.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_loadout_f: Trigger Holder full. You can only load %s Triggers.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_menu_hint: Use Trigger Loadout in Holder Menu mode to open the Holder. Loaded Trigger abilities are used from the MMNM ability menu.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_missing_t: You need the %s item in your inventory before you can load it into the holder.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_not_loade: %s is not loaded into your Trigger Holder.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_not_regis: %s is not loaded into your Trigger Holder.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_on_deacti: Trigger Off. Active Trigger states collapsed.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_on_requir: Trigger On is required before you can use loaded Triggers.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_swap_no_m: No Main Trigger is loaded in your Trigger Holder.
message.fightingstyles.trigger_swap_no_s: No Sub Trigger is loaded in your Trigger Holder.
message.fightingstyles.yuma_black_trigge: Use Yuma's registered seal abilities while the suit is active.
message.fightingstyles.yuma_suit_require: Yuma's Black Trigger suit must be active to use this seal.
overlay.fightingstyles.trigger_hint.rang: Sneak tightens fire. Sprint widens volleys and flank routes.
overlay.fightingstyles.trigger_hint.snip: Sneak narrows the beam. Sprint opens it for faster snapshots.
perk.fightingstyles.black_trigger_sync: Black Triggers load into the same holder system and sync their signature abilities from the active pair like normal Triggers.
perk.fightingstyles.dial_conservation: Chance to not consume dials when using abilities
perk.fightingstyles.side_effect_manifest: Your Trion awakens one permanent World Trigger Side Effect. The manifested trait appears in MMNM's passive list once it resolves.
perk.fightingstyles.trigger_holder: Build an eight-slot Trigger Holder with four Main and four Sub slots. The active Main/Sub pair, plus their derived composites, become your live kit.
perk.fightingstyles.trion_body: Trigger On manifests your trion body, reinforcing movement, jumps, and durability until you shut the holder down.
Press J to open the Side Effect Codex.
screen.fightingstyles.trigger_holder.ins: Load up to four Main and four Sub Triggers. The selected Main/Sub pair is your live kit.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.ambient_omen.d: Hidden nearby danger becomes easier to sense before direct contact, warning you through vague but actionable unease. The environment tilts before the ambush resolves.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.ambient_omen.f: Nothing visible changed, and yet everything suddenly feels warned.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.ambient_omen.s: Feel danger through subtle environmental wrongness before contact.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.animal_empathy: Animals calm around you, stop targeting you, and recover while staying near your presence. Living creatures read your trion as something they do not need to fear.
The wilderness answers your presence with recognition instead of alarm.
Pacify nearby animals and turn fauna into calm companions.
Aerial imbalance and hard landings become easier to correct, helping you stay stable through forced movement. Your body keeps finding the center line.
Where others fall into motion, you settle into it.
Hold your center while falling, landing, or recovering unstable footing.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.blindspot_awar: Enemies that lose sight of you become easier to pressure, and flank opportunities are highlighted by instinct. You feel the seam in their awareness and cut through it.
Every defense has a side it forgot to guard.
Exploit rear and flank windows before they close.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.combat_cadence: Combat rhythm becomes cleaner during active offense, improving pace, burst timing, and chain discipline. You stop fighting the tempo and start owning it.
Victory arrives on-beat more often than people admit.
Stay inside the right rhythm for bursts, chains, and interrupts.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.command_resona: Nearby allies amplify your combat rhythm and you return the favor with squad-wide pace and pressure buffs. Intent travels the squad like a live current instead of dead voice.
A team stops feeling like several people and starts feeling like one cadence.
Turn allied proximity into shared combat tempo.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.danger_sensiti: Nearby hostiles and incoming projectiles trigger a rapid defensive response before impact connects. Threat brushes your trion like static before it becomes damage.
You feel the hit before the world agrees it was coming.
Trigger an immediate defensive surge when danger closes.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.direction_sens: Recently safe bearings remain easier to recover, making long loops and chaotic movement less disorienting. A quiet inner vector keeps pointing home.
You do not always know where you are, but you always know how to stop being lost.
Keep a steady return path even when the route twists.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.echo_mapping.d: Hostiles behind cover can be outlined by recurring sonar-like reads, especially when they commit to hidden movement. Space starts answering back when you listen for it correctly.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.echo_mapping.f: Walls stop ending the fight. They just change the medium.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.echo_mapping.s: Sweep hidden terrain and movement with an acoustic battlefield read.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.emotion_percep: Nearby creatures broadcast their disposition and immediate intent through heart-like readings instead of raw stat boosts. Hostile, neutral, passive, targeting, and sniper pressure all become visible before the attack fully resolves.
A heartbeat confesses what a face still hides.
Read intent as colored hearts before enemies commit to action.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.enhanced_heari: Grounded motion ripples through the terrain in bouncing seismic reads that trace from your footing to the target. It feels less like sonar and more like the battlefield itself carrying hostile movement back into your body.
Stone speaks first. Eyes only confirm it later.
Feel grounded movement as ricocheting seismic sense instead of a glow outline.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.enhanced_memor: Training sticks faster, experience gains increase, and trion recovery becomes more efficient. What you practice refuses to fade back into ordinary muscle memory.
Once your trion understands a pattern, it keeps it.
Turn repetition into faster growth and better recovery.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.erasing_presen: Crouching dampens your signature, grants concealment, and makes distant hostiles struggle to maintain target lock. The field forgets to hold onto your outline.
It is not invisibility. It is the absence of attention.
Suppress noticeability itself while you stay disciplined and quiet.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.familiarity_in: Recently fought enemies become easier to reacquire, mark, and pressure with cleaner follow-up damage. Your trion keeps learning who is already in the notebook.
The second time is never as safe for them as the first.
Punish enemies you have already learned in previous exchanges.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.foresight.desc: Predictable hits can be completely avoided, especially when projectiles or committed attacks telegraph themselves. The battlefield flickers a heartbeat ahead of the present.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.foresight.flav: You move as if the attack had already happened somewhere else.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.foresight.shor: Cancel a telegraphed hit and leave a premonition trace.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.group_emotion_: Dense hostile groups become easier to interpret and pressure, turning cluster morale into a combat resource. Panic, aggression, and coordination ripple through the crowd in readable waves.
A squad's mood is loud if you know how to listen to crowds.
Read enemy clusters as a collective emotional state.
The current apex threat in a fight becomes easier to identify, mark, and punish with focused pressure. Your attention locks onto the enemy that matters most.
When a battle has a center of gravity, you feel it.
Identify the most dangerous hostile and focus the fight around them.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.low_light_visi: Dark environments remain legible without relying on a crude full night-vision wash. Black space softens into usable information.
Darkness stops being a wall and becomes another layer of detail.
Preserve readable contrast in caves, night fights, and dark interiors.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.multi_track_co: Multiple nearby targets can be tracked simultaneously, improving awareness and smoothing high-pressure target juggling. Your thoughts split into clean lanes instead of collapsing into noise.
One fight becomes several threads, and none of them snap.
Track several threats at once without losing control flow.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.pain_compartme: Low-health pressure causes less disruption, preserving mobility and fight discipline under pain. Injury still hurts, but it stops owning the whole system.
Pain is acknowledged, sorted, and denied the right to lead.
Stay functional while wounded instead of collapsing into shock.
Near-perfect timing reduces trigger cooldown friction and keeps your action rhythm cleaner. The smallest delay sounds wrong before it feels wrong.
Your timing is not fast. It is correct.
Trim cooldown rhythm by feeling exact combat tempo.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.seeing_through: Hidden, invisible, crouched, or misleading hostile presences are easier to identify and keep marked. False impressions peel away before they settle into your read.
A lie has shape, and your trion does not tolerate it.
Expose false information, stealth, and deceptive positioning.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.spatial_partit: Cover edges and movement lanes become easier to parse, granting safer aerial repositioning and smoother path selection. The battlefield breaks itself into usable slices.
Terrain stops being clutter and starts being structure.
Read cover lanes, safe movement cuts, and clean reposition routes.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.terrain_memory: Recently safe positions become easier to recover and use for retreat, especially when wounded. The map behind you stays alive instead of vanishing into panic.
Even in chaos, the field remembers where it once let you breathe.
Remember safe ground and retreat structure under pressure.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.thermal_residu: Recent hostile presence remains easier to trace after line of sight breaks or movement goes cold. Warm absence lingers like a fading silhouette.
A place remembers who just left it.
Read where enemies recently were even after they slip away.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.trajectory_rea: Nearby projectile threats become easier to evade and can even be slipped entirely when the line is readable. The air starts drawing its own warnings before impact lands.
Curves, arcs, and charge lines announce themselves like handwriting.
Read projectile lines before they close around you.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.tremor_sensiti: Grounded enemies that move nearby become easier to sense and mark through vibration. The floor starts speaking in impacts instead of silence.
Footfalls are loud when you listen through stone.
Read grounded movement through subtle vibration.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.trion_signatur: Recently active or recently lost hostiles are easier to track even after line of sight breaks. Spent trion lingers like a scent you can keep reading.
Power leaves fingerprints, and yours can still read them hot.
Follow recent hostile trion output like a residue trail.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.voice_print_me: Recently encountered hostiles become easier to remember and reacquire by their recurring presence signature. Familiar danger starts sounding unmistakably personal.
Some enemies leave a name in the air long before they speak it.
Recognize repeat threats by their familiar sound signature.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.wind_reading.d: Outdoor movement gains cleaner jump timing and open-air lines become easier to read and commit to. The sky stops being empty and starts carrying structure.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.wind_reading.f: Air has lanes too. Most people just never learn to see them.
sideeffect.fightingstyles.wind_reading.s: Exploit open-air flow for jumps, lines, and outdoor shots.
tooltip.fightingstyles.gunner_weapon.bas: Base fire: launches standard trion bullets whenever Trigger On is active and no matching gunner trigger is modifying the frame.
tooltip.fightingstyles.gunner_weapon.lin: Requires Trigger On and %s active in the holder.
tooltip.fightingstyles.gunner_weapon.mod: Modifier: an active matching gunner trigger changes the shot pattern, guidance, or payload.
tooltip.fightingstyles.gunner_weapon.tri: Trigger On from the Trigger Loadout ability is required before the gun frame can fire.
tooltip.fightingstyles.raygust_modes: Modes are selected from the MMNM alt-mode wheel: Guard | Blade
tooltip.fightingstyles.shield_modes: Modes are selected from the MMNM alt-mode wheel: Focused | Fixed | Full Guard. Shield stays up until toggled off or your Trion runs dry.
tooltip.fightingstyles.trigger_access.ho: Access: Assign to the Trigger Holder
Weapon: Hold left-click for automatic assault-rifle fire. Hold right-click to aim down sights.
Controls: Sneak favors focused black-trigger forms. Sprint favors aggressive pursuit or area pressure.
Controls: Sneak deploys a longer rampart. Sprint cages the aimed area with a ring of Escudo panels.
Weapon: Left-click launches one explosive shell. Hold right-click to line up your shot.
Guided shots can free-fire now. If no lock is ready, they launch first and acquire nearby hostiles later.
Weapon: Left-click fires a semi-auto handgun shot. Hold right-click to aim down sights.
Controls: Sneak uses a focused thrust. Sprint commits to an advancing slash.
Weapon: Hold left-click for a rapid minigun stream. Hold right-click to keep the spread tighter.
Controls: Sneak favors short precise movement. Sprint favors aggressive repositioning.
Weapon: Left-click fires. Hold right-click to aim down sights for a steadier shot.
Controls: Sneak performs a longer focused scan. Sprint runs a faster close combat sweep.
MMNM ability: Crouch tightens the shot pattern. Sprint opens pressure fire.
Weapon: Hold left-click for automatic fire. Hold right-click to aim down sights and tighten your line.
Controls: Sneak extends a pinning stab. Sprint commits to a mantis-style rush.
Weapon: Left-click fires a close-range trion spread. Hold right-click to tighten the blast.
Weapon: Hold left-click for a very fast, inaccurate SMG spray. Hold right-click to tighten it slightly at short range.
Controls: Left-click fires the rifle. Hold right-click to aim down sights; the MMNM ability stays separate.
tooltip.fightingstyles.trigger_menu: Use Trigger Loadout to toggle Trigger On or open the Holder, then use Trigger Swap to cycle the live Main/Sub pair from the MMNM ability menu.
tooltip.fightingstyles.trigger_register: Use to open the Trigger Holder.
